title: tragacantha psoraloides
intro: Tragacantha psoraloides, also known as Psoralia, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and India. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, containing compounds like psoralen, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tragacantha psoraloides include its potential to alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Traditionally, the plant's herbal preparations include extracts and powders, which can be used in topical creams, ointments, and teas to harness its medicinal properties.
